heading: Humane standards for animals by United States Government facilities
label: 2144 Humane standards for animals by United States Government facilities
text: Any department, agency, or instrumentality of the United States having laboratory animal facilities shall comply with the standards and other requirements promulgated by the Secretary for a research facility under sections 2143(a), (f), (g), and (h) of this title. Any department, agency, or instrumentality of the United States exhibiting animals shall comply with the standards promulgated by the Secretary under sections 2143(a), (f), (g), and (h) of this title.11So in original. Probably should be “section”.1
notes: Amendments1985— substituted “sections 2143(a), (f), (g), and (h) of this title” for “” in two places.Pub. L. 99–198section 2143 of this title1976— inserted “and other requirements” after “standards” in first sentence.Pub. L. 94–2791970— inserted provisions requiring facilities of the United States exhibiting animals to comply with standards promulgated by Secretary under .Pub. L. 91–579section 2143 of this title
Effective Date of 1985 AmendmentAmendment by effective one year after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–198section 1759 of Pub. L. 99–198section 2131 of this titleDec. 23, 1985
Effective Date of 1970 AmendmentAmendment by effective one year after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 91–579section 23 of Pub. L. 91–579section 2131 of this titleDec. 24, 1970

Compliance With Animal Welfare Act, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–328, div. A, title VII, § 750136 Stat. 4505Dec. 29, 2022“In this fiscal year [fiscal year 2023] and thereafter, and notwithstanding any other provision of law, ARS facilities as described in the ‘Memorandum of Understanding Between the U.S. Department of Agriculture Animal and Plant Health Inspection Service (APHIS) and the U.S. Department of Agriculture Agricultural Research Service (ARS) Concerning Laboratory Animal Welfare’ (16–6100–0103–MU Revision 16–1) shall be inspected by APHIS for compliance with the Animal Welfare Act [ et seq.] and its regulations and standards.”7 U.S.C. 2131
